meaning: n.(为演员写)笑料的作者,<俚>编造笑话的人
examples: I'm a gagster. This ain't even my hat.
Police cordoned the gagster's car outside a conference on e-government, where Gates said security had become the top priority for Microsoft.
But I got a chance to compare the younger gagster Buffett with his older, more curmudgeonly sidekick, Charles Munger, a Los Angeles attorney and investor.
